title: Keeper of Antiquities

{{Quote|Greetings, Jedi. I am the ''Keeper of Antiquities''.|Odan-Urr|<ref name="Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 4">[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 4|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 4]]</ref>}}
The '''Keeper of Antiquities''' was the title held by ancient [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] who controlled access to the [[Chamber of Antiquities/Legends|Chamber of Antiquities]] within the [[Great Jedi Library/Legends|Great Jedi Library]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]. These Keepers were charged with preserving the ancient texts as well as protecting the forbidden [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Dark side artifact/Legends|artifacts]], which included [[Sith holocron/Legends|Sith holocrons]].

During the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Odan-Urr/Legends|Odan-Urr]] was the Keeper of Antiquities. Upon his death, he was succeeded by the [[Neti/Legends|Neti]] Jedi Master [[Ood Bnar]].
